Description

org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer

org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.

CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.

CSV Marshalling Support

Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BsonParser
    Parses BSON (Binary JSON) into POJO models.
    static class 
    BsonParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    BsonParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    class 
    BsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to BSON (Binary JSON).
    static class 
    BsonSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    static class 
    BsonSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborParser
    Parses CBOR streams (RFC 8949) into POJO models.
    static class 
    CborParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    CborParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    class 
    CborSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to CBOR (RFC 8949).
    static class 
    CborSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    static class 
    CborSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    CsvParser
    Parses CSV (Comma Separated Values) input into Java objects.
    class 
    CsvSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to CSV (Comma Separated Values) format.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HoconParser
    Parses HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) text into POJO models.

    HoconSerializer

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HtmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as HTML documents.
    class 
    HtmlParser
    Parses text generated by the HtmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Simple
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.SimpleReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
    class 
    HtmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
    class 
    HtmlStrippedDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as stripped HTML.

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BaseHttpPartParser
    Base class for implementations of HttpPartParser
    class 
    BaseHttpPartSerializer
    Base class for implementations of HttpPartSerializer
    class 
    SimplePartParser
    An implementation of HttpPartParser that takes in the strings and tries to convert them to POJOs using constructors and static create methods.
    class 
    SimplePartSerializer
    An implementation of HttpPartSerializer that simply serializes everything using Object.toString().

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    IniParser
    Parses INI-formatted text into POJO models.
    class 
    IniSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to INI format.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JcsSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to canonical JSON per RFC 8785 (JCS).

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonLdParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing JSON-LD into POJOs.
    class 
    JsonLdSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to JSON-LD format.
    class 
    N3Parser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N3 (Notation3) into POJOs.
    class 
    N3Serializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N3 (Notation3) format.
    class 
    NQuadsParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Quads into POJOs.
    class 
    NQuadsSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Quads format.
    class 
    NTripleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Triples into POJOs.
    class 
    NTripleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Triples notation.
    class 
    RdfJsonParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/JSON into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfJsonSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/JSON notation.
    class 
    RdfParser
    Parses RDF into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfProtoParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    class 
    RdfProtoSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    class 
    RdfSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to RDF.
    class 
    RdfStreamParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    class 
    RdfStreamSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    class 
    RdfThriftParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    class 
    RdfThriftSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    class 
    RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML-Abbrev (abbreviated XML notation).
    class 
    RdfXmlParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/XML into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfXmlSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML (standard XML notation).
    class 
    TriGParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriG into POJOs.
    class 
    TriGSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriG format.
    class 
    TriXParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriX (XML) into POJOs.
    class 
    TriXSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriX (XML) format.
    class 
    TurtleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing Turtle into POJOs.
    class 
    TurtleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to Turtle format.

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonParser
    Parses any valid RFC 8259 JSON text into a POJO model.
    class 
    JsonSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metadata to HTTP responses as JSON-Schema.
    static class 
    JsonSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    class 
    JsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to RFC 8259 JSON.
    static class 
    JsonSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.

    Parses any valid JSON text into a POJO model.
    class 
    Json5Serializer
    Serializes POJO models to Simplified JSON.

    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MarkdownDocParser
    Parses Markdown document-mode output (headings + tables) back to POJOs.
    class 
    MarkdownDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown document mode (headings + tables).
    class 
    MarkdownParser
    Parses Markdown fragment-mode output (tables and lists) back to POJOs.
    class 
    MarkdownSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown (fragment mode: tables and lists).

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    MsgPackParser
    Parses a MessagePack stream into a POJO model.

    MsgPackParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    MsgPackParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    class 
    MsgPackSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to MessagePack.
    static class 
    MsgPackSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.

    MsgPackSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.

    class 
    OpenApiSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to values suitable for transmission as HTTP headers, query/form-data parameters, and path variables.

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InputStreamParser
    Subclass of Parser for byte-based parsers.
    class 
    Parser
    Parent class for all Juneau parsers.
    static class 
    Parser.Null
    Represents no Parser.
    static class 
    ParserSet.Inherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
    static class 
    ParserSet.NoInherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
    class 
    ReaderParser
    Subclass of Parser for characters-based parsers.

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PlainTextParser
    Parsers HTTP plain text request bodies into Group 5 POJOs.
    class 
    PlainTextSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to plain text using just the toString() method on the serialized object.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    OutputStreamSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for byte-based serializers.
    class 
    Serializer
    Parent class for all Juneau serializers.
    static class 
    Serializer.Null
    Represents no Serializer.
    static class 
    SerializerSet.Inherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
    static class 
    SerializerSet.NoInherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
    class 
    WriterSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for character-based serializers.

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SseParser
    Parses text/event-stream input (WHATWG Server-Sent Events) into Java objects.
    class 
    SseSerializer
    Serializes SseEvent objects to the text/event-stream wire format defined by the WHATWG Server-Sent Events spec.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TomlParser
    Parses TOML v1.0.0 text into POJOs.
    class 
    TomlSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to TOML v1.0.0 format.

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UonParser
    Parses UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values) text into POJO models.
    static class 
    UonParser.Decoding
    Default parser, decoding.
    class 
    UonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values).
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Encoding
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().encoding().build();.
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().ws().build();.

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UrlEncodingParser
    Parses URL-encoded text into POJO models.
    class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Expanded
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().expandedParams().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.PlainText
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().plainTextParts().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().useWhitespace().build();.

  • Uses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml

    Subclasses of MarshallingContextable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    XmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML.
    static class 
    XmlDocSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    class 
    XmlParser
    Parses text generated by the XmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
    class 
    XmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to XML.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSq
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSqReadable
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes, with whitespace.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.

    YamlSerializer
